overview: National Institute of Technology (NIT) Jamshedpur, established in 1960 as Regional Institute of Technology (RIT) and elevated to an Institute of National Importance in 2007, is fully funded by the Ministry of Education, Government of India. Spanning a rolling 341-acre campus on the outskirts of Jamshedpur, Jharkhand, the institute specializes in undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral programs across engineering, sciences, and computer applications.
accreditation: Autonomous Institute of National Importance under the NIT Act; curricula and degrees approved and monitored by the Ministry of Education, Government of India.

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹1,25,000 per year for General/OBC candidates (₹62,500 per semester). Tuition fee is 100% waived for SC/ST/PH students. Partial or full tuition remissions apply to General/OBC students based on family income slabs.
Approximately ₹1,58,000 per year (Total ~₹3.16 Lakhs for 2 years) depending on specific admission categories.
Approximately ₹70,000 per year (Total tuition fee around ₹1.40 Lakhs).
Approximately ₹1,03,000 per year (Total ~₹2.06 Lakhs for 2 years).

placements.avgSalary: ₹12.63 LPA (Overall Institutional Average across programs; CSE averages ₹20.24 LPA)
placements.medianSalary: ₹11.00 LPA (For graduating engineering streams as per institutional records)
placements.highestSalary: ₹1.44 Cr PA (Peak domestic package recorded in recent campus cycles)
placements.placementRate: Approximately 90% to 94.72% overall, with core branches like Metallurgy achieving up to 100% and Production tracking at 95%
placements.totalOffers: Over 725 students placed successfully in the recent active recruitment phase
placements.companiesVisited: Atlassian, Goldman Sachs, Amazon, Tata Steel, Vedanta, ExxonMobil, Infosys, Wipro, TCS, IBM, Tech Mahindra
placements.internationalOffers: Mainly domestic top-tier technical and executive engineering assignments

admissions.admissionProcess: B.Tech seats are allotted through JoSAA/CSAB counseling based on JEE Main scores. M.Tech admissions are processed through CCMT, MCA through NIMCET centralized counseling, and M.Sc via CCMN.
admissions.importantDates: Aligned directly with nationwide schedules declared by JoSAA, CSAB, CCMT, and NIMCET counseling boards.

campus.area: Spread over 341.30 acres of rolling landscape bordered by the Kharkai River in the western part of Jamshedpur city.
facilities: Medical Units (MoU with Netaji Subhash Medical College & Hospital)
campus.specialNote: Hostel charges including meals run roughly to ₹1,28,000 periodically depending on hostel block configurations and administrative norms.

availableScholarships: Central Sector Scholarship Scheme for SC/ST students
scholarshipsAndAid.details: 100% tuition fee waiver for SC, ST, and PH categories. Full tuition waiver for General/OBC candidates whose annual family income is below ₹1 Lakh, and a 2/3rd tuition fee remission for those with a family income between ₹1 Lakh and ₹5 Lakhs.

rankings.nirf: Ranked 82nd in the 'Engineering' category by the Ministry of Education, Government of India
rankings.naac: Evaluated directly under national regulatory technical frameworks for Tier-1 centrally funded institutes of national importance

contact.address: P.O. – NIT Jamshedpur, Adityapur, District- Saraikela Kharsawan, Jharkhand, Pin- 831014
